case_title: LYNDA TOM VS. INTERDENT SERVICES CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF LYNDA TOM IS PRESENT.
